subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who hast ordained for those who suffered martyrdom in Thy path exalted stations and sublime degrees whereat the sincere ones rejoice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من قدر للذین استشهدوا فی سبیله مقامات عالیه و درجات سامیه یغتبطهم فهیا المخلصون
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for martyrs, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
